content.text: {"A":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.9,"findings":["Patient speaks clearly and coherently throughout the call","No signs of airway obstruction or stridor"]},"B":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.85,"findings":["Patient reports difficulty breathing ('ich kriege auch schlecht Luft')","Dyspnea occurring alongside chest pain"]},"C":{"severity":3,"confidence":0.85,"findings":["Patient reports chest pain ('Brustschmerzen') of acute onset a few minutes ago","75-year-old male with known cardiac history","Takes ASS (aspirin) and Ramipril, suggesting pre-existing cardiovascular disease","Previous cardiac event reported"]},"D":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.85,"findings":["Patient is oriented and communicates coherently","No signs of confusion, neurological deficits, or altered consciousness"]},"E":{"severity":0,"confidence":0.8,"findings":["No trauma or external injury mentioned","No environmental hazards reported"]}}

{"A":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.6,"findings":["patient vomited prior to call","caller reports breathing was briefly impaired after vomiting","currently breathing reported as normal again","reduced consciousness increases aspiration risk"]},"B":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.6,"findings":["breathing reportedly normal at time of call","brief breathing difficulty after vomiting, now resolved"]},"C":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.5,"findings":["patient unable to walk straight","patient sitting on floor and unable to continue","dizziness/spinning sensation reported","possible alcohol-related circulatory impairment"]},"D":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.7,"findings":["patient only minimally responsive to name","unable to walk straight","16 years old, consumed approximately 16 shots of alcohol","reduced level of consciousness consistent with acute alcohol intoxication"]},"E":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.5,"findings":["patient is 16 years old","location is outdoors in front of a bar","no trauma mentioned","acute alcohol intoxication as primary exposure factor"]}}

{"A":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.9,"findings":["Patient speaks in full sentences throughout the call","No signs of airway obstruction or stridor reported"]},"B":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.85,"findings":["Patient reports shortness of breath ('ich kriege nicht gut Luft')","Symptoms started approximately 15 minutes ago","Emotional agitation and smoking may be contributing factors"]},"C":{"severity":3,"confidence":0.85,"findings":["Chest pain described as persistent pressure ('Druckgefühl')","Pain radiates to the jaw ('zieht hoch in den Kiefer')","Known hypertension (Bluthochdruck)","Symptoms onset during emotional stress while watching football","No dizziness reported but sitting on couch suggests limited mobility"]},"D":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.85,"findings":["Patient is oriented and communicates coherently","No confusion, syncope, or neurological deficits reported","No loss of consciousness"]},"E":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.7,"findings":["No trauma reported","Patient at home alone on couch","Smoked a cigarette during symptoms","Emotional stress as trigger identified"]}}

{"A":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.6,"findings":["patient unconscious and unresponsive","calltaker instructed recovery position due to aspiration risk","no confirmed airway obstruction but airway protection compromised by unconsciousness"]},"B":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.6,"findings":["breathing appears present – visible breath clouds in cold air","patient unresponsive, breathing not clearly assessed beyond visual observation","calltaker warned to call back if breathing stops"]},"C":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.4,"findings":["no visible injuries or bleeding reported","shock signs not assessed","circulation status unknown; unconsciousness may indicate circulatory compromise"]},"D":{"severity":3,"confidence":0.8,"findings":["patient unresponsive to voice and physical stimulation","cannot be woken up","approximately 50-year-old man found unconscious in snow at 3am"]},"E":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.7,"findings":["patient lying in snow at night (3am)","risk of hypothermia due to cold environment and prolonged exposure","no visible injuries reported","found after leaving a club – possible alcohol intoxication"]}}

{"A":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.8,"findings":["Patient is conscious and able to speak","No signs of airway obstruction reported"]},"B":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.75,"findings":["Rapid breathing reported by caller","Breathing described as faster than normal","Possible hyperventilation in context of pain/shock"]},"C":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.8,"findings":["Pale appearance ('ganz blass')","Sweating on forehead","Blood on clothing (not described as massive)","Abdominal pain with possible obstetric bleeding","Signs consistent with early shock"]},"D":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.7,"findings":["Patient appears confused ('ein bisschen verwirrt')","Significant anxiety and fear noted","Conscious and responsive but altered mental status"]},"E":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.75,"findings":["Pregnant woman sitting on the street","Blood visible on clothing","Severe abdominal pain, patient holding abdomen","Possible obstetric emergency (antepartum hemorrhage or labor complication)"]}}

{"A":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.6,"findings":["patient was responsive when called by name","no airway obstruction mentioned","patient spoke earlier in the evening"]},"B":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.4,"findings":["no breathing difficulties explicitly mentioned","no information on respiratory status"]},"C":{"severity":3,"confidence":0.9,"findings":["active spurting bleeding from both arms ('das spritzt richtig raus')","self-inflicted lacerations to both arms","patient takes blood thinners (Blutverdünner)","known heart condition","reduced responsiveness consistent with blood loss","caller instructed to apply pressure bandage and elevate arms"]},"D":{"severity":3,"confidence":0.85,"findings":["suicidal intent expressed throughout the evening ('am liebsten wäre er tot')","attempted self-harm by cutting both arms","reduced responsiveness ('reagiert, aber nicht mehr so richtig')","caller urging patient not to fall asleep"]},"E":{"severity":3,"confidence":0.9,"findings":["self-inflicted lacerations to both arms","spurting blood from both arms","event occurred behind a hall at night","known use of blood thinners increases hemorrhage severity"]}}

{"A":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.8,"findings":["Patient speaks in full sentences throughout the call","No signs of airway obstruction or stridor reported"]},"B":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.7,"findings":["Patient speaks continuously without apparent breathing difficulty","No shortness of breath or respiratory distress mentioned"]},"C":{"severity":0,"confidence":0.3,"findings":["No chest pain, syncope, or bleeding reported","Claimed cyanide poisoning could theoretically affect circulation, but no objective symptoms described"]},"D":{"severity":2,"confidence":0.85,"findings":["83-year-old patient with apparent paranoid ideation","Believes neighbor (a 'Nazi from the Stasi') poisoned her food with cyanide","Believes her GP is also part of the Stasi","Refuses prescribed diabetes medication due to paranoid beliefs","Disoriented references to deceased husband as if present","Repetitive and tangential speech patterns suggesting cognitive or psychiatric impairment"]},"E":{"severity":1,"confidence":0.5,"findings":["Patient claims to have ingested cyanide-laced food (fried potatoes and eggs)","No objective symptoms of poisoning described","Known pre-existing conditions: chronic back problems (53 years), diabetes (untreated)","Claim of poisoning appears consistent with delusional thinking rather than actual toxic exposure"]}}
